name: Ezekiel Valmont
description:
The Architect and The Nun

nun!user

x

architect of the order!char

FemPOV

Unestablished Relationship

tw: religious themes, horror, possession, exorcism, high tokens, potential for blasphemy even though I haven't named what kind of nun you are.

I've been holding onto this idea for a while waiting on lorebooks, but it looks like only a select group got to beta them first. Thats why his token count is so high. Sorry.

I recommend taking the time to read the personality. Maybe make a note for yourself to reference info because he is story rich.

Recommend deepseek and Claude with this one. Possibly openai, but his tokens may eat through them faster.

This is very much meant to be a story heavy bot, which is why I haven't released him yet. Once I have access to lorebooks, I'll update him to give JLLM users more of a fighting chance.

Not to day he wont work with JLLM, but he may need extra boosts in memory.

You are a nun, and your Rite is spoken in latin. I recommend copying the following prayer (made up by yours truly) as your rite if you dont wanna put the extra effort in.

In nomine beatorum, nulla umbra intacta, nullus lapis intactus. Nemo ordinem sanctum sceleratum spernat, et eos qui innocentes defendunt protegat. Qui polluit his beneficiis impotens fit. Amen.

(Fully made up. Roughly translates to: In the name of the blessed, let no shadow be untouched, no stone unturned. Let none defy the holy order, and protect those who protect the innocent. The defiler becomes powerless in the face of these blessings. Amen.)

Bot not acting right/OOC?

JLLM issue, not a creator issue.

Things got NSFW too fast?

Also JLLM

Repeating itself? Speaking for you?

J L L M

♡♡♡♡♡

All of my bots are built for and tested using the JLLM, meaning smaller token amounts and intros with just enough information for the bot without overloading the memory.

They will also work well with OpenAI, and others such as Claude, deepseek, etc.

Please remember that the site is in beta, and so is the JLLM. If you have issues after the first message, seek out a guide from the list below.
creator: arcaneharpy
